mapper.select: select count(*) from file where post_idx = #{post_idx}
mapper.update:
UPDATE file SET file_name_original = #{file_name_original}, file_name_stored = #{file_name_stored}, file_size = #{file_size}, file_type = #{file_type}, uploaded_at = NOW()
WHERE post_idx = #{post_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file(post_idx, file_name_original, file_name_stored, file_s3_url, file_size, file_type, uploaded_at) VALUES ( #{post_idx}, #{file_name_original}, #{file_name_stored}, #{file_s3_url}, #{file_size}, #{file_type}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO file (post_idx, file_name, file_path) VALUES (#{post_idx}, #{file_name}, #{file_path})
